quotes: The wound is the place where the light enters you.
Nature does not hurry, yet everything is accomplished.
The universe is change; our life is what our thoughts make it.
The earth has music for those who listen.
The greatest glory in living lies not in never falling, but in rising every time we fall.
In the depth of winter, I finally learned that within me there lay an invincible summer.
The clearest way into the Universe is through a forest wilderness.
The soul should always stand ajar, ready to welcome the ecstatic experience.
The deepest wisdom is to understand and accept the impermanence of all things.
The universe is not a collection of distinct objects, but a continuum, where everything is connected and interdependent.
The fire that forges the sword is the same fire that melts it.
The mystery of life is not a problem to be solved, but a reality to be lived.
The trees that are pruned, are the ones that bear the most fruit.
The winter of our discontent is the season of our greatest transformation.
